ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved - PR Deployed
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Just a quick update on the Jira ticket #12345 titled 'API timeout on production'. Issue resolve ho gaya hai and corresponding PR merge ho gaya hai. View merge commit here <URL> and updated doc in Wiki at <URL>. Agar koi aur question ho toh batao.

Shukriya,
Arjun

spam.subject: URGENT: HR Payroll Confirmation Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Employee,

HR Department se aapko batana hai ki aapke September payroll records mein anomaly detected hua hai. Salary transfer delay na ho, please bank details aur salary amount verify karne ke liye secure link pe click karein:

<URL>

24 ghante ke andar comply na karne par salary issuance temporarily suspend ho sakti hai. Agar aapne details already update kar diya hai, toh is notice ko ignore karein.

Regards,
HR Team
